current.headline: France vs Sweden: knockout preview and two-goal margin watch
current.summary: France and Sweden meet in a World Cup knockout tie where the key questions are squad availability, attacking sharpness and whether France can build enough control to win by a two-goal margin.

items.headline: Official: Thuram out of France squad for World Cup Round of 32 clash
items.summary: France's knockout preparations took a hit with Marcus Thuram ruled out, an update that matters directly for any market built around whether France can create enough separation on the scoreboard.

items.headline: Japan and Sweden both reach World Cup last 32 after Elanga’s strike seals draw
items.summary: Sweden's route into the last 32 was sealed by Anthony Elanga's response against Japan, giving useful recent form context for the underdog side in a market focused on whether France can cover a bigger margin.
